item.title: Saint Arnold Brewing: Spring Bock, Ep. 141
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
We’ve been trying Bock beers lately on Beer America TV, and this week we continue the theme with Spring Bock from Saint Arnold Brewing Company. Spring Bock is an authentic German style bock that is malty goodness from beginning to end. They call it the laziest beer they brew because it takes 8 weeks to […]

The post Saint Arnold Brewing: Spring Bock, Ep. 141 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Lagunitas: Little Sumpin’ Wild Ale, Ep. 133
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Most people like a Little Sumpin’, so this week on Beer America TV, we’re giving you a Little Sumpin’ Wild! Described as the big sister of A Little Sumpin’ Sumpin’ Ale, this Belgian Style Strong Pale Ale from the Lagunitas Brewing Company is truly a step up in taste and style . It has a […]

The post Lagunitas: Little Sumpin’ Wild Ale, Ep. 133 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Captain Lawrence Brewing: Birra DeCicco, Ep. 132
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Just north of New York City comes another brewery making a big impression on the American Craft brewing landscape. This week we’re talking about Birra DeCicco from Captain Lawrence Brewing Company in Pleasantville NY. Birra DeCicco is described as a Malt Beverage brewed with Chestnut Honey and Jam, but we can tell you that there […]

The post Captain Lawrence Brewing: Birra DeCicco, Ep. 132 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Heavy Seas, Prosit! – Ep. 112
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
OK, in October, it seems everyone is coming out with an Octoberfest of some sort, well not Heavy Seas . This week we dive into a serious dose of PROSIT! by Clipper City Heavy Seas series. This is a full bodied malty glass full of goodness, with serious a backbone of grains and a few […]

The post Heavy Seas, Prosit! – Ep. 112 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Alaskan Brewing Company – Alaskan Winter, Ep. 94
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
From time to time we are fortunate enough to receive “samples” from various breweries across the country, this weeks beer came all the way from Juneau Alaska to Savannah, Georgia! I’m talking about Alaskan Winter from the Alaskan Brewing Company . Described as an Olde English Ale, this malty copper colored ale has a surprise […]

The post Alaskan Brewing Company – Alaskan Winter, Ep. 94 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Clipper City Brewing’s Small Craft Warning (Über Pils) – Ep. 47
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Clipper City Brewing describes its Heavy Seas lineup of beers as the highest expression of the brewers art, and their Über Pils falls nicely in that category. Lightly golden in color, this beer is full of flavor with all the complexity of a fine American Craft beer . Well balanced and smooth, it certainly can […]

The post Clipper City Brewing’s Small Craft Warning (Über Pils) – Ep. 47 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.
